title: [Submission] SwiGLU MLP (under 16MB)
author: Abhinav-Avasarala
body:
## Summary
This submission modifies the baseline GPT architecture by replacing the original ReLU² MLP with a SwiGLU-based MLP. To stay within the strict 16MB submission constraint, the MLP width was reduced (MLP_MULT=1), balancing expressiveness and parameter efficiency.

## Key Changes
- Replaced ReLU² MLP with SwiGLU (SiLU + gating)
- Reduced MLP width to control parameter count and model size
- Added gradient clipping for improved training stability and quantization robustness

## Results
- val_loss: 2.4848
- val_bpb: 1.4716
- Final model size (int8 + zlib): ~13.6MB

## Notes
- Trained for 2000 iterations on a single training shard (development run)
- Submission focuses on architectural improvement and size efficiency
- Not yet optimized for full dataset training or leaderboard performance
submission_readme:
# SwiGLU Parameter Golf Submission

## Summary
- Replaced MLP ReLU^2 with SwiGLU
- Reduced MLP width (MLP_MULT=1) to stay under size limit
- Trained for 2000 iterations

## Results
- val_loss: 2.4848
- val_bpb: 1.4716
- Model size: ~13.6MB (int8 + zlib)

## Notes
- Trained on 1 shard (not full dataset)
- Development run (not optimized for leaderboard yet)
